steps.title: Find the contrast after 'but'
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast with “but.” Before it, scientists claim mammals were “not very [blank].” After it, Luo's research reveals various plant-eating mammals and gliding species — a range of different types.

steps.title: The blank describes what scientists underestimated
steps.content: The word must complete: “not very [diverse].” diverse is correct.
